semverGroups.label: Workspace-local references carry no range (pnpm workspace:* protocol)
Expo ecosystem in @glaon/mobile tracks Expo SDK pins — exact for react/react-native, ~ for expo-*
Default range policy: caret for minor+patch flexibility

versionGroups.label: Workspace-local packages resolve via pnpm protocol — pinning is automatic
Expo SDK pins — @glaon/mobile follows Expo's own upgrade cadence (Expo CLI manages these)

Intentional drift: @glaon/ui tracks Storybook's Vite 8 / plugin-react 6; @glaon/web stays on Vite 6 / plugin-react 4 for app build. Revisit when Storybook supports Vite 6 again or when web needs Vite 8.
